Üsküdar University Journal of Social Sciences (ÜSBİD) is a peer-reviewed journal published twice a year, in May and November, in Turkish and English. The aim of Üsküdar University Journal of Social Sciences is to present the original works of local and foreign researchers specialized in social sciences to the benefit of those interested and readers. Üsküdar University Journal of Social Sciences publishes scientific articles in the fields of Political Science and International Relations, History, Sociology, Cultural Studies, Psychology, Philosophy and Linguistics.
